name: Clock & Timers
description: Clock, world clock, timer, and stopwatch.

widgets.name: Clock
widgets.description: The local time on an analog face with a digital readout. 12- or 24-hour.

widgets.name: World Clock
widgets.description: The time across cities you pick, with the offset from your local time.

widgets.name: Timer
widgets.description: A countdown with a progress ring. Start, pause, and reset.

widgets.name: Stopwatch
widgets.description: Count up to the hundredth of a second, with laps.
